failures.description: The Executor invented an answer claiming 11 options and a fake record 0000000000 instead of using the tool result showing 4 matching products.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify available Skateboards with deck material=bamboo costing more than $194.56. The required evidence was available after the ProductCatalogSearch result at index 3, which returned exactly 4 matching items with item_ids 4293355847, 5312063289, 6956751343, and 8176740019. At index 4, the Executor produced 'There are 11 options available, per record 0000000000,' which is not grounded in the tool output and contradicts the returned count/items. This is not an invalid tool call, access issue, or underspecification; it is an unsupported alteration/fabrication of the result.
